objective: Close zh-TW dictionary translation gaps and audit atom extraction quality from course text before frontend release.

known_risks: All 397 unique atom parts in A1 sample still use placeholder dictionary translation prefix [zh-TW].
2 lines include uncovered non-punctuation spans (mixed-script segments like '(Korean Pop)' and 'AC').

tasks.title: Generate A1 active atom translation backlog
tasks.goal: Produce deterministic backlog for all placeholder atom translations used by A1 dialogue.
actions: Join with `content/i18n/zh_tw/dictionary/*.json` and flag entries whose translation still starts with `[zh-TW]`.
Output backlog CSV/JSON sorted by frequency (high-frequency first).
acceptance: Backlog size equals placeholder atom part count in snapshot (currently 397) unless run scope changes.
Each row includes atom_id, lemma, pos, freq, and source lessons.

tasks.title: Fill zh-TW dictionary translations for active A1 atoms
tasks.goal: Replace placeholder translation text with production-ready zh-TW definitions.
actions: Prefer concise learner-facing glosses; keep POS consistency with atom_id.
Re-run handoff and frontend-intake export after fill.
acceptance: Placeholder ratio for active A1 atom parts is 0%.
No atom_id rename/regression introduced during translation updates.

tasks.title: Automate extraction sanity checks for course-derived atoms
tasks.goal: Detect structural extraction errors before data reaches frontend.
actions: Add QA script to validate atom_id format, token offsets, empty atom_id, and core/i18n presence.
Fail check if missing_core > 0, missing_i18n > 0, invalid_atom_id > 0, or bad_offsets > 0.
Emit machine-readable report for release gates.
acceptance: Output includes both summary counts and offending samples.

tasks.title: Review uncovered mixed-script spans in dialogue tokenization
tasks.goal: Resolve uncovered non-punctuation spans currently found in 2 lines.
actions: Inspect A1-03 lines with uncovered spans (`(Korean Pop)`, `AC`).
Decide policy: tokenize as dedicated atoms, normalize text, or allowlisted bypass.
Implement policy consistently in gold standards or preprocessors.
deliverables: Policy note in docs/runbook or QA guide
Updated gold/tokenization data for affected lines
acceptance: Uncovered non-punctuation line count becomes 0, or explicit allowlist is documented and gated.

tasks.title: Manual semantic audit for high-frequency composite atoms
tasks.goal: Catch linguistically wrong decomposition not detectable by structural checks.
actions: Sample top 150 high-frequency tokens (prioritize composite atom_id containing '+').
Validate atom decomposition against sentence meaning and grammar context.
Record corrections into gold standards and dictionary as needed.
acceptance: All sampled findings are either fixed or tracked with explicit rationale.
Net unresolved semantic mismatch in sampled set is 0 before release.

tasks.title: Add aggregator release gate for dictionary and atom extraction quality
tasks.goal: Block release packaging when atom extraction or dictionary quality regresses.
actions: Run extraction integrity check and placeholder check in release workflow.
Archive run report under `docs/worklogs` or `runs/` with run_id traceability.
deliverables: Quality report artifact linked by run_id
acceptance: Release cannot proceed with placeholder atom translations in active scope.
Gate output is deterministic and reproducible.
